title: SWD Premier League: Last matches in 1st round
description: CRICKET NEWS - The last series of cricket...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The last series of cricket matches in the first round of the SWD Premier League will be contested on Saturday 6 December.

The top four teams on the log will be in action against one another.


> The defending champion, Union Stars I, will host Sussex, while the Knysna Cavaliers will be in action at home against Pacaltsdorp United at Loerie Park.


The current log positions in the premier league:

First: Knysna Cavaliers: 21 points (6 matches)

Second: Union Stars I : 20 points (6 matches)

Third: Sussex: 19 points (6 matches)

Fourth: Pacaltsdorp United: 12 points (4 matches)

Fifth: Harlequins Forces: 10 points (5 matches)

Sixth: Union Stars II: 10 points (6 matches)

Seventh: George: 7 points (5 matches)

Eighth: New Dawn Park: 2 points (6 matches)

The league fixtures:

- Saturday 6 December

Premier League: Union Stars I vs Sussex, New Dawn Park vs Harlequins Forces, George vs Union Stars II, Knysna Cavaliers vs Pacaltsdorp United.

Reserve League Division 1: Dysselsdorp vs Beaufort West, Kranshoek Cobras vs Western Hope, KwaNonqaba vs Pacaltsdorp United B, Mayflower vs Hartenbos, Melkhoutfontein vs Albertinia.

- Sunday 7 December

Reserve League Division 1: Bongolethu A vs Harlequins Forces C.

Reserve League Division 2: Sussex B vs Hartenbos B, New Dawn Park B vs Mossel Bay B, George D vs Sussex C, Knysna Cavaliers C vs Pirates United B, Plett Pioneers B vs Plett Pioneers C, Calitzdorp Young Stars A vs Western Hope B.
